notes: Wasted a re-sync step when user already synced
With skill: 100% pass rate across all evals. Without skill: 64% average — fails on workflow correctness, not just missing features
Onboarding without skill uses clams init which is interactive — it blocks waiting for stdin and would hang in a non-interactive subagent context
Capital gains without skill requires the user to choose between 3 PDF conversion approaches and install external dependencies — poor UX
Troubleshooting without skill wastes time re-syncing when the user already confirmed they synced — skill correctly skips this
With-skill runs are 35% faster and use 17% fewer tokens — the skill eliminates trial-and-error exploration
